name: ITeddsDocuments
summary: Interface for a collection of open documents

methods.name: Add()
methods.remarks: Adding a new document will prompt the user to choose the calculation they want to use and the document will be calculated.

methods.name: Add2(string, string, string)
methods.signature: ITeddsDocument Add2(string libraryFileName, string libraryItemName, string VariablesXml)
methods.summary: Add a new document using the specified Calc Item and input variables

params.name: libraryFileName
params.doc: Name of the Calc Library file in which the Calc Item exists

params.name: libraryItemName
params.doc: Short name of the Calc Item which is used to start the calculation

params.name: VariablesXml
params.doc: Input variables for the document which have been created using an existing document or via the Tedds Calculator API.

methods.name: Add3(string, string, string, string, string)
methods.signature: ITeddsDocument Add3(string documentName, string libraryFileName, string libraryItemName, string VariablesXml, string outputRtf)
methods.summary: Add a new document using the specified Calc Item, input variables and pre-calculated RTF
methods.remarks: The input variables XML and the output RTF can be directly retrieved by using the Tedds Calculator API.

params.name: libraryFileName
params.doc: Name of the Calc Library file in which the Calc Item exists

params.name: libraryItemName
params.doc: Short name of the Calc Item which is used to start the calculation

params.name: VariablesXml
params.doc: Input variables for the document which have been created using an existing document or via the Tedds Calculator API .

params.name: outputRtf
params.doc: Output in RTF format which has been retrieved from an existing document or via the Tedds Calculator API.

params.name: SaveChanges
params.doc: false to discard unsaved changes; otherwise save changes

methods.name: GetEnumerator()
methods.summary: Enumeration interface for iterating the items in the collection

methods.name: Save()
methods.summary: Saved changes to all open documents

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Returns the number of documents in the collection

properties.name: this[object]
properties.summary: Returns a single document in the collection
